description_long: This object is a classic Nokia mobile phone, featuring a robust, dark plastic body with a slightly curved back and a prominent external antenna at the top right. The front face displays a monochrome screen above a physical keypad with oval, tactile buttons arranged in a grid, including a central navigation button and call control keys. The sides are smooth and rounded, with minimal detailing, while the back is plain except for a circular indentation likely for battery access. The phone's overall design is utilitarian, with a matte finish and subtle texturing for grip. The Nokia logo is clearly visible above the screen, and the device exudes a sense of durability typical of late 1990s and early 2000s mobile phones. No camera or modern features are present, emphasizing its era-specific functionality.
description: A classic Nokia mobile phone with a dark plastic body, external antenna, monochrome screen, and physical keypad. The design is robust, utilitarian, and features the Nokia logo above the display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Nokia logo, monochrome screen, and a full physical keypad with oval buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the phone's thickness, curved profile, and the protruding antenna at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back with a circular indentation, likely for battery access, and the antenna on the top left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the smooth, rounded edge and the antenna's position, with no visible buttons or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: The Nokia logo is printed in white, located above the screen on the front face, clearly visible and horizontally aligned.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen appears blank or turned off, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: No camera modules or lenses are visible on any side of the object.
attribute_button_layout: There are twelve oval physical buttons arranged in a grid below the screen on the front, including number keys, call control keys, and a central navigation button. A single round power button is located at the top right corner near the antenna.
